pi_items.source: task.json description and setup_task.sh explicitly require this path.
task.json description and setup_task.sh explicitly require this path.
task.json description explicitly states: 'Columns: tone_freq, letter, soa, corr_resp_tone, corr_resp_letter'. The metadata and verifier only list three of them.
task.json description explicitly requires 'At least 10 trials'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a PsychoPy dual-task experiment with specific file paths: a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/prp_conditions.csv and an experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/prp_task.psyexp. The conditions file must contain at least 10 rows and 5 specific columns (tone_freq, letter, soa, corr_resp_tone, corr_resp_letter), although the verifier and metadata incorrectly check only a subset of these columns.
